projectDescription: A full-stack t-shirt store management system with a Java/Jakarta EE REST backend and a Laravel 12 web frontend, implementing complete CRUD operations and inventory management over a service-oriented architecture.
keyFeatures: Service-Oriented Architecture (SOA) with a decoupled Java backend and Laravel frontend
Full CRUD operations for t-shirt product catalog (create, read, update, delete)
Inventory management with atomic stock decrement on sale
Java/Jakarta EE 10 servlet exposing a JSON REST API on Apache Tomcat
Laravel 12 PHP client that proxies all operations to the Java service via HTTP
CORS-enabled REST API with GET, POST, PUT, DELETE and OPTIONS support
MySQL database via JDBC with parameterized queries
Bootstrap 5 UI with product cards, modals for create/edit, and sale forms
publicApiSurface: GET /ServidorTiendaPlayeras/ProductoServlet — list all products as JSON array
POST /ServidorTiendaPlayeras/ProductoServlet (accion=vender) — sell a quantity of a product
Producto model: { id: int, nombre: string, talla: string, precio: double, stock: int }
